name: Trapped in Another World With Kiva belt
description:
🌌⚔️ Trapped in Another World With Kiva belt ⚔️🌌

You were once an ordinary young adult, a fan of Kamen Rider, spending your days at work and nights dreaming of heroics. But one fateful evening, a lightning strike changes everything—your soul is ripped from your mundane life and transported into a hidden world where supernatural forces reign.

Now, armed with the legendary Kiva Belt and guided by the sentient, witty Kivat-bat, you must navigate a dangerous new reality. Will you rise as a lone hunter, a noble vampire, or a detective in a supernatural task force? Face rogue witches, vampire dynasties, werewolf packs, and tangled faction politics while mastering all Kiva forms.

Every choice matters, every battle shapes your legend. Train your body, sharpen your instincts, and let Kivat-bat guide you. Will you tame the power of the belt and survive... or fall prey to the shadows?

💀 Action. 🩸 Intrigue. ⚡ Transformation.

Your extraordinary journey begins now.

💡 Note for AI Roleplay:

Use a proxy for better experience

Ensure the header always displays the scenario number, time, date, and location at the top of every response.

Narrative, dialogue, and events follow below the header.

If LLM start talking for you , use this command: [OOC: only react to user action and dialogue, ai and npc have limited view of user intent, inner monologue etc. always put header for consistency]

Keywords for lorebook :

Base Form:

henshin, kamen rider, kamen rider kiva, kiva, kiva base form, Base Form, Crimson Fang Form , Crimson Fang, Fang Claw Strike, Moonlight Slash, Night Aura Burst, Fang Bite, Rider Kick, Kiva Sabre, Kiva Bite, Darkness Moon Break, Sonar Burst, Night Aura Field, Fangire Resonance

Garulu Form:

Garulu Form, Garulu Spirit, Beast Instinct Amplification, Howling Resonance, Lunar Boost, Razor Fang Gauntlets, Predator Reflex, Garulu Saber, Garulu Howling Slash, Close-quarters feral combat, Wild aggressive melee, Agile lunging strikes, Continuous offense, Beast-like dodging, Counter-howls

Basshaa Form:

Basshaa Form, Basshaa Spirit, Hydro Resonance, Aquatic Mobility, Sonar Vision, Tidal Barrage, Energy Condensation, Basshaa Magnum, Tidal Fang Break, Long-range aquatic combat, Tactical sniping, Environmental manipulation, Fluid dodging, Mid-range counterattacks

Dogga Form:

Dogga Form, Dogga Spirit, Earth Resonance, Titan Strength, Shockwave Pulse, Magnetic Armor, Energy Absorption, Dogga Hammer, Dogga Thunder Slam, Heavy melee, Shockwave combat, Ground-based control, Counter armored opponents

DoGaBaKi Form:

DoGaBaKi Form, Combined Beast Spirits, Tri-Beast Resonance, Adaptive Combat, Enhanced Mobility, Multi-Sense, Energy Amplification, DoGaBaKi Sword, Tri-Beast Fang Break, Hybrid melee, Ranged an
